description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a global before_script echoing the three test matrix combinations and sets a MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variable. Add a test:centos6xmysql56 job in the test stage using the centos:6.6 image with a mysql:5.6.17 service, running rpm -q centos-release, yum install -y mysql, mysql --version, and mysql -h mysql -u root -p${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD} -e 'SELECT VERSION()'. Add a test:centos7xmysql57 job in the test stage using the centos:7 image with a mysql:5.7 service, executing the same four commands. Add a test:centos8xmysql8 job in the test stage using the centos:8 image with a mysql:8 service, executing rpm -q centos-release, dnf install -y mysql, mysql --version, and mysql -h mysql -u root -p${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD} -e 'SELECT VERSION()'. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, so all jobs run on every pipeline.
